entries.notes: Report schema writer tests land with report schema task, including internal_error run.error shape plus distinct backend_stability and operator_stability coverage.
AI prompt request schema tests land with advisory commands before prompts are emitted as machine-readable artifacts.

AI context tests land with provider/context task, including complete nested objects, distinct backend/operator stability coverage, result-level skip_reason coverage, and 4096 UTF-8 byte stdout/stderr excerpt bounds.
AI explain response tests land with advisory commands, including the shared doctest classification labels reused by task 055.
AI suggest response tests land with advisory commands.
AI review-tests response tests land with advisory commands.
Doctest report schema tests land with the CLI doctest task before JSON doctest reports are emitted.

Task 055 creates and tests the non-survivor doctest AI context flows from docs/DOCTEST_AI_INTEGRATION.md; task 067 later extends the same schema with explain_doctest_survivor after task 061 stabilizes mutation-aware report fields.
Doctest AI suggestion response schema tests land with task 055 from the exact target in docs/DOCTEST_AI_INTEGRATION.md.
Doctest AI snapshot-review response schema tests land with task 055 from the exact target in docs/DOCTEST_AI_INTEGRATION.md.
Pipeline handoff schema is future work.
Pipeline active lock schema is future work owned with the task 041 artifact cutover.
Task 041 creates the baseline schema for validator-backed context artifacts; tasks/042-context-packet-system.md later refines role-specific context packet fields and fixtures.
Task 041 creates the baseline schema for validator-backed stale-context artifacts; tasks/042-context-packet-system.md later refines stale-context semantics and fixtures.
Task 041 creates the baseline schema for validator-backed verification artifacts; tasks/046-verification-pipeline.md later refines final verification fields and fixtures.
Task 041 creates the baseline schema for validator-backed escalation artifacts; tasks/049-pipeline-escalation.md later refines escalation triggers, outcomes, and monotonic gate fixtures.
Queue JSON is validated by the task-system validator.
Status JSON is validated by the task-system validator, including clean_handoff_baseline source_commit and per-file sha256 checks.
